title: Authors and Citation
text: Bartosz Czech. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Czech B (2026). BRASSVis: Visualization Structural Variants BRASS. R package version 1.0.0, https://github.com/bczech/BRASSVis.
code: @Manual{,   title = {BRASSVis: Visualization of Structural Variants from BRASS},   author = {Bartosz Czech},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 1.0.0},   url = {https://github.com/bczech/BRASSVis}, }

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
text: Visualize gene fusions structural variants detected BRASS (BReakpoint AnalySiS) whole-genome sequencing data. Based Arriba visualization approach adapted WGS structural variant BEDPE output. fusion rendered multi-panel page showing: - Chromosome ideograms breakpoint positions - Exon structure intron squishing - Circos plot genomic context - Retained protein domains fusion transcript - Supporting read counts assembly scores

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
code: # From GitHub pak::pak("bczech/BRASSVis")  # Or with remotes remotes::install_github("bczech/BRASSVis")

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
text: BRASSVis requires Bioconductor packages GenomicRanges, IRanges, S4Vectors. installed automatically pak. installing manually:

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
code: library(BRASSVis)  # Generate a full PDF report brass_report(   bedpe_path = "results.bedpe",   gtf_path = "Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.gtf.gz",   output_pdf = "fusions_report.pdf" )

what: With protein domains and custom cytobands
title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
code: brass_report(   bedpe_path = "results.bedpe",   gtf_path = "Homo_sapiens.GRCh37.75.gtf.gz",   output_pdf = "report.pdf",   cytobands_path = system.file("ref", "cytobands_hg19_hs37d5_GRCh37_v2.1.0.tsv",                                package = "BRASSVis"),   protein_domains_path = system.file("ref", "protein_domains_hg19_hs37d5_GRCh37_v2.1.0.gff3",                                      package = "BRASSVis") )

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
code: # Read BEDPE fusions <- read_brass("results.bedpe")  # Load annotations ann <- load_annotations(   gtf_path = "Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.gtf.gz",   protein_domains_path = system.file("ref",     "protein_domains_hg38_GRCh38_v2.1.0.gff3", package = "BRASSVis") )  # Plot a single fusion pdf("single_fusion.pdf", width = 11.7, height = 8.3) plot_fusion(fusions[1, ], fusions, 1, ann$exons, ann$cytobands,             ann$protein_domains) dev.off()

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
code: Rscript inst/scripts/BRASSVis.R \   -i results.bedpe \   -e Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.gtf.gz \   -o report.pdf \   --proteinDomainsFile ref/protein_domains_hg38.gff3 \   --cytobandsFile ref/cytobands_hg38.tsv

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
code: docker build -t brassvis . docker run brassvis Rscript -e 'BRASSVis::brass_report(   "input.bedpe", "annotation.gtf", "output.pdf")'

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
text: package includes cytobands protein domain annotations : Access system.file("ref", "<filename>", package = "BRASSVis").

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
text: BRASSVis reads annotated BEDPE files produced BRASS. file must contain columns: chr1, start1, chr2, start2, strand1, strand2, svclass, gene1, gene2, fusion_flag, others.

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
text: example report generated test data available tst/report.pdf.

text: Bartosz Czech Pawel Sztromwasser Marzena Wojtaszewska

title: BRASSVis — Fusion Visualization for BRASS
text: GPL-3

what: BRASSVis: Visualization of Structural Variants from BRASS — BRASSVis-package
title: BRASSVis: Visualization of Structural Variants from BRASS — BRASSVis-package
text: Visualize gene fusions structural variants detected BRASS (BReakpoint AnalySiS) whole-genome sequencing data. Reads BEDPE files produces publication-ready PDF reports showing breakpoints, exon structure, ideograms, circos plots, protein domain retention. Based Arriba visualization approach adapted WGS structural variant data.

title: BRASSVis: Visualization of Structural Variants from BRASS — BRASSVis-package
text: Maintainer: Bartosz Czech bartosz.w.czech@gmail.com (ORCID) Authors: Bartosz Czech bartosz.w.czech@gmail.com (ORCID)

what: Generate a full BRASS fusion report — brass_report
title: Generate a full BRASS fusion report — brass_report
text: Read BEDPE file, load annotations, produce multi-page PDF one page per fusion event showing exon structure, ideograms, circos plots, protein domain retention.

title: Generate a full BRASS fusion report — brass_report
code: brass_report(   bedpe_path,   gtf_path,   output_pdf = "brass_report.pdf",   cytobands_path = NULL,   protein_domains_path = NULL,   fusion_flag_threshold = 720,   transcript_selection = "provided",   color1 = "#e5a5a5",   color2 = "#a7c4e5",   font_size = 1,   pdf_width = 11.692,   pdf_height = 8.267,   print_exon_labels = TRUE )

title: Generate a full BRASS fusion report — brass_report
text: bedpe_path Path BRASS .bedpe file. gtf_path Path GTF annotation file. output_pdf Path output PDF file. cytobands_path Path cytobands TSV. NULL, uses built-GRCh38 cytobands. protein_domains_path Path protein domains GFF3. NULL, protein domains drawn. fusion_flag_threshold Minimum fusion flag score include fusion (default 720). transcript_selection One "provided" "canonical". color1, color2 Colors two genes fusion. font_size Font size multiplier. pdf_width, pdf_height PDF page dimensions inches. print_exon_labels Include exon numbers plot.

title: Generate a full BRASS fusion report — brass_report
text: Invisible path output PDF.

title: Generate a full BRASS fusion report — brass_report

what: Load annotation files for fusion visualization — load_annotations
title: Load annotation files for fusion visualization — load_annotations
text: Parse GTF, cytobands, protein domain files needed plot_fusion() brass_report().

title: Load annotation files for fusion visualization — load_annotations
code: load_annotations(   gtf_path,   cytobands_path = NULL,   protein_domains_path = NULL,   print_exon_labels = TRUE )

title: Load annotation files for fusion visualization — load_annotations
text: gtf_path Path GTF annotation file (.gtf .gtf.gz). cytobands_path Path cytobands TSV file. NULL, uses built-GRCh38 cytobands inst/ref/. protein_domains_path Optional path protein domains GFF3 file. NULL, protein domains drawn. print_exon_labels TRUE, parse include exon numbers.

title: Load annotation files for fusion visualization — load_annotations
text: list elements: exons, cytobands, protein_domains.

title: Load annotation files for fusion visualization — load_annotations

what: Plot a single fusion event — plot_fusion
title: Plot a single fusion event — plot_fusion
text: Draw detailed visualization one structural variant / gene fusion, including exon structure, ideograms, breakpoint labels, circos plot, protein domain retention.

title: Plot a single fusion event — plot_fusion
code: plot_fusion(   fusion,   fusions,   fusion_idx,   exons,   cytobands,   protein_domains = NULL,   color1 = "#e5a5a5",   color2 = "#a7c4e5",   font_size = 1,   transcript_selection = "provided" )

title: Plot a single fusion event — plot_fusion
text: fusion single-row data.frame read_brass() (preprocessed breakpoints parsed directions set). fusions full fusions data.frame (needed circos context). fusion_idx Row index fusion fusions. exons Parsed exon annotation load_annotations(). cytobands Parsed cytobands load_annotations(). protein_domains Parsed protein domains (NULL). color1, color2 Colors two genes. font_size Font size multiplier. transcript_selection One "provided" "canonical".

title: Plot a single fusion event — plot_fusion
text: Invisible NULL. Draws current graphics device.

title: Read BRASS BEDPE output — read_brass
text: Parse BEDPE file produced BRASS structural variant caller data.frame suitable visualization.

title: Read BRASS BEDPE output — read_brass
text: path Path .bedpe file.

title: Read BRASS BEDPE output — read_brass
text: data.frame columns: gene1, gene2, strand1, strand2, direction1, direction2, breakpoint1, breakpoint2, type, transcript_id1, transcript_id2, fusion_flag, others.

title: Read BRASS BEDPE output — read_brass
code: bedpe <- system.file("extdata", "example.bedpe", package = "BRASSVis") if (nzchar(bedpe)) fusions <- read_brass(bedpe)
